description: You are the store accountant for Urban Electronics. A corporate customer, Mike Wilson (username: mikewilson), has sent a check (#CK-9982) for $1,392.00 to pay for his recent order of office equipment (Order #1). The order is currently in 'Fulfillment' state but marked as Unpaid. Record this offline payment in the system to settle the order balance for Order #1. The Drupal admin credentials are admin / Admin1234!.
